inputs.label: House Area
inputs.businessContext: Total livable area in square feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total livable area in square feet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface habitable totale en pieds carrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Superficie habitable total en pies cuadrados.

businessContext_i18n.tr: İnşa yılından bu yana geçen yıl sayısı.

inputs.label: Base Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Average annual maintenance cost per square foot for a new house.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average annual maintenance cost per square foot for a new house.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni bir ev için ft² başına yıllık ortalama bakım maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche jährliche Instandhaltungskosten pro Quadratmeter für ein Neubauhaus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'entretien annuel moyen par pied carré pour une maison neuve.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual promedio de mantenimiento por pie cuadrado para una vivienda nueva.

inputs.label: Age Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost factor per year of age (e.g., 0.02 for 2% per year).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional cost factor per year of age (e.g., 0.02 for 2% per year).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her yaş yılı başına ek maliyet faktörü (örn. 0,02 = %2/yıl).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Kostenfaktor pro Altersjahr (z.B. 0,02 für 2% pro Jahr).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de coût supplémentaire par année d'âge (par exemple, 0,02 pour 2 % par an).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de costo adicional por año de antigüedad (ej. 0.02 para 2% anual).

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inflation rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.03 for 3%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual inflation rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.03 for 3%).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel sous forme décimale (par exemple, 0,03 pour 3 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de inflación anual como decimal (ej. 0.03 para 3%).

inputs.label: Projection Years
inputs.businessContext: Number of years to project total maintenance cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years to project total maintenance cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam bakım maliyetinin hesaplanacağı yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre für die Prognose der Gesamtinstandhaltungskosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années pour projeter le coût d'entretien total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años para proyectar el costo total de mantenimiento.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
